description: Pre-implementation coverage baseline for IFC-214 (Redis-backed AI Monitoring State Bridge). Phase-0 exploration established this is a TEST-ONLY delta: the production bridge (router/store/publisher/container/context) is already on origin/main via #59 and is NOT modified. The delta relocates the orphaned cross-process integration test into the CI integration lane (tests/integration/) and strengthens it to drive the real RedisMonitoringPublisher -> Redis -> real RedisAIMonitoringStore, and deletes the superseded apps/api/.../ai-monitoring.redis.integration.test.ts. No production source lines change, so production coverage is unchanged by construction; AFTER snapshot will re-measure the same in-scope files to confirm zero regression.
measurement_scope: apps/api/src/modules/ai-monitoring/ai-monitoring.redis-store.ts (in-scope production file; UNCHANGED — exercised by the new integration test + existing unit tests)
apps/ai-worker/src/monitoring/redis-monitoring-publisher.ts (in-scope production file; UNCHANGED — exercised by the new integration test + existing unit tests)
tests/integration/ai-monitoring-redis-bridge.test.ts (NEW test file — test code, not a coverage target)

apps/api/src/modules/ai-monitoring/__tests__/ai-monitoring.redis.integration.test.ts (DELETED — was excluded from coverage by the *.integration.test.ts glob, so removal does not change measured coverage)
command: Scoped istanbul vitest --coverage runs at baseline (origin/main @ 2de1aef52): apps/api ai-monitoring.redis.unit + router tests over ai-monitoring.redis-store.ts; apps/ai-worker redis-monitoring-publisher.test.ts over redis-monitoring-publisher.ts.

apps/api/src/modules/ai-monitoring/ai-mo.note: 100% line coverage from ai-monitoring.redis.unit.test.ts (34) + ai-monitoring.router.test.ts; unchanged by this task

apps/ai-worker/src/monitoring/redis-moni.note: 100% line coverage from redis-monitoring-publisher.test.ts (19); unchanged by this task

baseline_totals.note: Aggregate of the two in-scope production files. No production source changes in this task -> AFTER equals BEFORE (zero regression expected).
